notes: Originally founded 1988 in Boston MA; acquired by Harte-Hanks 2006; by Halyard Capital 2015; by Spiceworks Ziff Davis 2020
Founded 1996 as Procuresoft; IPO 1999; market cap peaked at $40B in 2000; acquired by SAP for $4.3B in 2012; now SAP Ariba with 2.5M+ vendor network
Founded 1994 as DistriVision; renamed 1997; IPO July 1999; market cap $21.5B at dot-com peak; filed bankruptcy October 2004; acquired by Perfect Commerce 2006

ERP and procurement software competitor; later acquired PeopleSoft (2005) and became major e-procurement player
